evals.prompt: Validate artifacts/sourceweave_web_search.py locally without OpenWebUI. Use the repo's standalone workflow, run a quick search for 'python programming', and verify read_pages on the first result.
evals.expected_output: Runs the standalone harness with deployment-aligned defaults and reports whether search_web plus read_pages behave correctly.

evals.prompt: Check whether the tool still works if I rely on its default valves and do not change any service URLs. Use the local docker stack and tell me if anything looks deployment-risky.
evals.expected_output: Confirms the defaults target searxng, crawl4ai, and redis by deployment-style service name and surfaces any remaining risks.

evals.prompt: Run the direct tool-call tests for artifacts/sourceweave_web_search.py and focus on whether page_id results can be read back from a fresh tool instance.
evals.expected_output: Uses the standalone checks and specifically validates the page_id/read_pages follow-up behavior.
